name: Fireball
components: V, S, M (a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)
description:
A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere must make a **Dexterity saving throw**.

- *Fail:* 8d6 fire damage
- *Success:* half damage

The fire spreads around corners and ignites flammable objects.

name: Mage Hand
description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration or until you dismiss it.

The hand can **manipulate an object**, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item, or pour the contents of a vial. Maximum **10 pounds**.
classes: Arcane Trickster, Bard, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Detect Magic
description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you.

> If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object bearing magic.

The spell can penetrate most barriers, but 1 foot of stone blocks it.
classes: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Phantasmal Force
components: V, S, M (a bit of fleece)
description:
You craft an illusion that takes root in the mind of a creature you can see. Make an **Intelligence (Investigation) check** contested by the target's check.

- The illusion deals `1d6` psychic damage per turn
- Target perceives illusion as real
- *Concentration required*

name: Animate Dead
components: V, S, M (a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust)
description:
This spell creates an undead servant. Choose a pile of bones or a corpse within range.

### Undead Stats
- **Skeleton:** AC 13, HP 13
- **Zombie:** AC 8, HP 22

The undead obeys your verbal commands for **24 hours**, after which it acts of its own free will.

name: Polymorph
description:
This spell transforms a creature with at least 1 HP into a new form.

- Takes the **statistics** of the chosen form
- Retains **alignment** and personality
- Equipment merges into the new form

The transformation lasts for the *duration*, or until it drops to 0 HP.

name: Charm Person
description:
You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see. It must make a **Wisdom saving throw**.

- On fail: charmed until end of spell
- Creature regards you as a **friendly acquaintance**
- Knows it was charmed when spell ends

*Higher Levels:* +1 creature per slot level above 1st.

name: Shield
description:
An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you.

**Until the start of your next turn:**
- +5 bonus to AC
- No damage from *magic missile*

`Trigger:` When you are hit by an attack or targeted by *magic missile*.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
components: S, M (a glowing stick of incense or a crystal vial filled with phosphorescent material)
description:
You create a twisting pattern of colors that weaves through the air inside a **30-foot cube**.

- Creatures that can see the pattern must make a **Wisdom save**
- On fail: **incapacitated** and speed drops to 0
- Condition ends if the creature takes damage

A creature that succeeds is unaffected.

name: Counterspell
description:
You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell.

- Spell of **3rd level or lower:** automatic success
- Higher level: make an **ability check** using your spellcasting ability
  - DC = 10 + spell level
  - On success: spell fails

`Trigger:` A creature you can see casts a spell.

name: Misty Step
description:
Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you **teleport** up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.

- Instantaneous teleport
- Must be able to **see** destination
- Does not provoke opportunity attacks

Often used to escape difficult terrain or bypass barriers.

name: Eldritch Blast
description:
A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature.

- Make a **ranged spell attack**
- On hit: `1d10` force damage

**At Higher Levels:**
- Level 5: two beams
- Level 11: three beams
- Level 17: four beams

Each beam can hit the same or different targets.

name: Wish
description:
The mightiest spell a mortal creature can cast.

> *"I wish..."*

- Duplicate any spell of **8th level or lower**
- Create an effect of your design
- **Stress:** 33% chance of losing *Wish* permanently

The GM has latitude to limit unintended consequences. Use with care.

name: Invisibility
components: V, S, M (an eyelash encased in gum arabic)
description:
A creature you touch becomes **invisible** until the spell ends.

- Attacking or casting a spell ends invisibility
- Anything worn or carried is also invisible

*Higher Levels:* Target one additional creature per slot level above 2nd.

Widely considered one of the most *versatile* spells available.

name: Lightning Bolt
components: V, S, M (a bit of fur and a rod of amber, crystal, or glass)
description:
A stroke of lightning forming a line **100 feet long and 5 feet wide** blasts from you.

- Each creature must make a **Dexterity saving throw**
- Fail: `8d6` lightning damage
- Success: half damage

The lightning ignites flammable objects it touches.

name: Find Familiar
components: V, S, M (10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs)
description:
You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an **animal form**.

### Familiar Forms
- Bat, cat, crab, frog, hawk
- Lizard, octopus, owl, rat
- Raven, sea horse, snake, spider, weasel

The familiar acts independently on its own initiative.

name: Cure Wounds
description:
A creature you touch regains hit points equal to `1d8 + spellcasting modifier`.

- Has no effect on undead or constructs
- Must physically touch the target

*Higher Levels:* +1d8 per slot level above 1st.

One of the most **fundamental** healing spells in any caster's arsenal.

name: Darkness
components: V, M (bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal)
description:
Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range, filling a **15-foot-radius sphere**.

- Blocks darkvision
- Nonmagical light cannot penetrate
- Can be cast on an object

A spell using light of 2nd level or higher can **dispel** this darkness.

name: Scrying
components: V, S, M (a focus worth at least 1,000 gp)
description:
You can see and hear a particular creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence.

**Target's Save Modifier:**
- Knows you well: −4
- Acquaintance: +0
- Heard of: +5
- Never met: +10

Sensor appears invisible, 1 foot from target.

name: Time Stop
description:
You briefly stop the flow of time for everyone but yourself.

- `1d4 + 1` turns pass for you, 0 time passes for others
- Ends early if you affect another creature
- Cannot move hostile creatures

> *"The world held its breath."*

One of the most powerful temporal manipulation spells known.
